name: arclet-entari

metadata.name: arclet-entari
metadata.summary: Simple IM Framework based on satori-python

documentation:
# Entari > _lí no etheclim, nann ze entám rish._
[![Licence](https://img.shields.io/github/license/ArcletProject/Entari)](https://github.com/ArcletProject/Entari/blob/main/LICENSE) [![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/arclet-entari)](https://pypi.org/project/arclet-entari) [![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/arclet-entari)](https://www.python.org/) ![Entari](https://img.shields.io/badge/Arclet-Entari-2564c2.svg) 一个基于 `Satori` 协议的简易 IM framework ## 示例 使用配置文件: ```yaml # config.yml basic: network: - type: ws port: 5140 path: satori log_level: INFO plugin: example_plugin: {} ::echo: {} ::auto_reload: watch_dirs: ["plugins"] ``` ```python from arclet.entari import Entari app = Entari.load("config.yml") app.run() ``` 复读: ```python from arclet.entari import Session, Entari, WS app = Entari(WS(host="127.0.0.1", port=5140, path="satori")) @app.on_message() async def repeat(session: Session): await session.send(session.content) app.run() ``` 指令 `add {a} {b}`: ```python from arclet.entari import Session, Entari, WS, command @command.on("add {a} {b}") async def add(a: int, b: int, session: Session): await session.send(f"{a + b = }") app = Entari(WS(port=5500, token="XXX")) app.run() ``` 编写插件: ```python from arclet.entari import Session, MessageCreatedEvent, metadata metadata( name="Hello, World!", author=["Arclet"], version="0.1.0", description="A simple plugin that replies 'Hello, World!' to every message." ) # or __plugin_metadata__ = PluginMetadata(...) @MessageCreatedEvent.dispatch() async def _(session: Session): await session.send("Hello, World!") ``` 加载插件: ```python from arclet.entari import Entari, WS, load_plugin app = Entari(WS(port=5140, path="satori")) load_plugin("example_plugin") load_plugin("::echo") load_plugin("::auto_reload", {"watch_dirs": ["plugins"]}) app.run() ```

functions.name: arclet.entari.plugin.module.package
documentation: 手动指定特定模块作为插件的子模块

functions.name: arclet.entari.plugin.module.requires
documentation: 手动指定哪些模块是插件

methods.name: arclet.entari.plugin.module.PluginLoader.get_code
documentation:
Concrete implementation of InspectLoader.get_code.

Reading of bytecode requires path_stats to be implemented. To write
bytecode, set_data must also be implemented.

methods.name: arclet.entari.plugin.module.PluginLoader.source_to_code
documentation:
Return the code object compiled from source.

The 'data' argument can be any object type that compile() supports.

methods.name: arclet.entari.session.EntariProtocol.send_message
documentation:
发送消息。返回一个 `MessageReceipt` 对象构成的数组。

Args:
    channel (str | Channel): 要发送的频道 ID
    message (str | Iterable[str | Element]): 要发送的消息
    source (Event | None): 源事件

Returns:
    list[MessageReceipt]: `MessageReceipt` 对象构成的数组

methods.name: arclet.entari.session.EntariProtocol.send_private_message
documentation:
发送私聊消息。返回一个 `MessageReceipt` 对象构成的数组。

Args:
    user (str | User): 要发送的用户 ID
    message (str | Iterable[str | Element]): 要发送的消息
    source (Event | None): 源事件

Returns:
    list[MessageReceipt]: `MessageReceipt` 对象构成的数组

methods.name: arclet.entari.session.EntariProtocol.message_create
documentation:
发送消息。返回一个 `MessageReceipt` 对象构成的数组。

Args:
    channel_id (str): 频道 ID
    content (str | Iterable[str | Element]): 消息内容
    source (Event | None): 源事件

Returns:
    list[MessageReceipt]: `MessageReceipt` 对象构成的数组

classes.name: arclet.entari.session.Session

methods.name: arclet.entari.session.Session.prompt
documentation:
发送提示消息, 并等待回复

Args:
    message: 要发送的消息
    timeout: 等待超时时间
    timeout_message: 超时后发送的消息
    keep_sender: 是否只允许原发送者回复

methods.name: arclet.entari.session.Session.send_message
documentation:
发送消息

Args:
    message: 要发送的消息

methods.name: arclet.entari.session.Session.send_private_message
documentation:
发送私聊消息

Args:
    message: 要发送的消息

methods.name: arclet.entari.session.Session.update_message
documentation:
更新消息

Args:
    message: 要更新的消息
在 Satori-Python 的 Session 的基础上存储了当次事件的信息

functions.name: arclet.entari.plugin.load_plugin
documentation:
以导入路径方式加载模块

Args:
    path (str): 模块路径
    config (dict): 模块配置
    recursive_guard (set[str]): 递归保护

classes.name: arclet.entari.logger.LoguruHandler
documentation: logging 与 loguru 之间的桥梁，将 logging 的日志转发到 loguru。

classes.name: arclet.entari.command.model.Match
documentation:
匹配项，表示参数是否存在于 `all_matched_args` 内

Attributes:
    result (T): 匹配结果
    available (bool): 匹配状态

classes.name: arclet.entari.command.model.Query
documentation:
查询项，表示参数是否可由 `Arparma.query` 查询并获得结果

Attributes:
    result (T): 查询结果
    available (bool): 查询状态
    path (str): 查询路径

classes.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.__getitem__
documentation:
获取仅包含指定消息段类型的消息

Args:
    args: 消息段类型

Returns:
    所有类型为 `args` 的消息段

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.__getitem__
documentation:
索引指定类型的消息段

Args:
    args: 消息段类型和索引

Returns:
    类型为 `args[0]` 的消息段第 `args[1]` 个

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.__getitem__
documentation:
切片指定类型的消息段

Args:
    args: 消息段类型和切片

Returns:
    类型为 `args[0]` 的消息段切片 `args[1]`

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.__getitem__
documentation:
索引消息段

Args:
    args: 索引

Returns:
    第 `args` 个消息段

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.__getitem__
documentation:
切片消息段

Args:
    args: 切片

Returns:
    消息切片 `args`

type.name: type[TE1] | tuple[type[TE1], int] | tuple[type[TE1], slice] | int | slice

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.__contains__
documentation:
检查消息段是否存在

Args:
    value: 消息段或消息段类型
Returns:
    消息内是否存在给定消息段或给定类型的消息段

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.index
documentation:
索引消息段

Args:
    value: 消息段或者消息段类型
    args: start 与 end

Returns:
    索引 index

Raise:
    ValueError: 消息段不存在

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.get
documentation:
获取指定类型的消息段

Args:
    type_: 消息段类型
    count: 获取个数

Returns:
    构建的新消息

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.count
documentation:
计算指定消息段的个数

Args:

Returns:

methods.name: arclet.entari.message.MessageChain.only
documentation:
检查消息中是否仅包含指定消息段

Args:

Returns:

documentation:
将多个消息连接并将自身作为分割

Args:

Returns:
